meaning: n.(炼油过程中产生的)重整油
examples: The dimethylbenzenes are obtained from catalytic reformate.
A rapid method for determining benzene contents in reformate by Near Infrared Spectroscopy is described in this paper.
Yield of reformate oil, hydrogen and aromatics was increased by 1.3 %, 0.5 % and 2.2%, respectively, when WHSV increased by 20%.
Reformate is blended with gasoline to improve its quality.
